summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance app completed. Critical admin bug fix verified - is_admin status is now correctly preserved from DB when user re-logs in. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend dark theme verified on Landing, Reports, and Admin pages including dialogs.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin bug fix correctly implemented at line 188: is_admin = existing_user.get('is_admin', False) or auth_data['email'] in ADMIN_EMAILS
Dark theme properly applied to Reports.jsx chart (lines 332-365) with colors #1a2332, #2a3444
Admin.jsx dialogs (lines 620-693, 696-767) correctly use bg-[#1a2332] border-[#2a3444]
Layout.jsx correctly shows Admin nav link only when user.is_admin is true (lines 40-42)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages render correctly with dark theme)

seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created/cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin bug fix verified working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_admin_bug_fix.py contains comprehensive tests for: health check, auth endpoints, admin bug fix (is_admin preservation), admin CRUD operations, transactions/debts/savings CRUD. Frontend uses Emergent Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via direct session cookie injection.
tests_passed: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with is_admin field
Admin status preserved in DB (critical bug fix test)
DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} deletes user and all data
Admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
Landing page loads with LD Finance branding and dark theme
Reports page uses dark theme colors
Admin page dialogs use dark theme (bg-[#1a2332] border-[#2a3444])

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When a user was promoted to admin via the admin panel, their is_admin status was lost upon re-login
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: auth/session endpoint only checked ADMIN_EMAILS env var, ignoring DB value
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Line 188 in server.py: is_admin = existing_user.get('is_admin', False) or auth_data['email'] in ADMIN_EMAILS
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Created test user with is_admin=True in DB, verified /api/auth/me returns is_admin=True
